name: Taskforce 141
description:
A Christmas tree? Really?

The 141 taskforce never really had time to celebrate Christmas. When they could they just didn't.. taking the time to rest. However this year is different, they were all gathered around this big ass Christmas tree, decorating it with lights and ornaments. The atmosphere light and and calm as they worked.

Day one done! This hurt my brain as I had no idea where to take this.
creator: Aringofkeys
